home.title: Genomic Data Interpretation Services | GenomeLight
home.description: GenomeLight provides genomic data interpretation, sequencing reagents, genetic risk assessment, and genomic data compression for healthcare, research, and personal health contexts.

about.title: About GenomeLight | Genomic Data Analysis Team
about.description: Learn about the GenomeLight team, genomic data analysis capabilities, service scope, and privacy principles supporting healthcare and research workflows.

glsofort.description: GLSofort supports variant screening, evidence organization, and reporting workflows for WGS, WES, and Gene Panel data, with qualified professional review.

reagent.description: Review high-throughput sequencing reagent kits for NextSeq 500/550, including displayed batch quality data, specifications, application scope, and storage conditions.

health.title: Genetic Risk Assessment Information | GenomeLight
health.description: Explore WES, WGS, and gene-chip services for genetic risk associations, carrier screening, and pharmacogenomic information, including scope, process, and limitations.

compression.title: ZipHelix Genomic Data Compression | GenomeLight
compression.description: ZipHelix provides lossless compression, archiving, object storage, and retrieval for genomic sequencing data, with on-premise, private, and hybrid cloud deployment.

contact.title: Contact GenomeLight | Product and Technical Enquiries
contact.description: Contact the GenomeLight teams in Chongqing and Shenzhen about genomic interpretation, sequencing reagents, genetic risk assessment, or data compression products.

compliance.title: Medical information notice
compliance.description: This page is for product and technical communication only. It is not medical diagnosis, treatment, or medication advice. Testing and interpretation results require review by qualified professionals with relevant clinical information; product scope and performance are subject to confirmed documentation and actual reports.

workflow.title: From sequencing data to reviewable output
workflow.description: Bring automated analysis, evidence organization, and professional review into one workflow so scope, sources, and limitations are easier to inspect.

steps.title: Data intake
steps.description: Receive WGS, WES, or Gene Panel data according to project configuration and review data quality and analysis scope.

steps.title: Assisted analysis
steps.description: Use bioinformatics workflows, knowledge bases, and machine-learning methods for variant screening and evidence organization.

steps.title: Professional review
steps.description: Qualified professionals review outputs with clinical information, applicable guidance, and evidence levels.

workflow.imageAlt: GLSofort genomic data interpretation workflow diagram
workflow.caption: Platform workflow illustration. Actual inputs, outputs, and integrations depend on project configuration and confirmed technical documentation.

principles.title: Explainable workflows for professional judgment
principles.description: High-quality genomic data services require more than algorithms: clear scope, human review, and careful management of sensitive information are essential.

items.title: Traceable evidence
items.description: Preserve source, version, and applicability information so professionals can inspect the evidence behind an output.

items.title: Results require review
items.description: Automated output assists analysis and does not replace qualified professional judgment or clinical decisions.

items.title: Data managed by agreement
items.description: Confirm permissions, data location, retention, and applicable requirements before deployment and apply agreed protections.

principles.illustrationAlt: GenomeLight genomic laboratory and data analysis illustration

team.title: Place automated analysis in professional context
team.description: The GenomeLight team spans genetics, bioinformatics, laboratory workflows, and product implementation. Defined review points keep platform output within professional workflows instead of treating algorithmic results as diagnostic conclusions.
team.link: Meet the team and review their backgrounds
team.imageAlt: Portrait of a GenomeLight core team member

genePanels.title: GENE PANELS
genePanels.subtitle: We provide comprehensive Gene Panel testing services covering multiple medical specialties. Each panel is carefully designed to contain key genes for relevant diseases, combined with WES/WGS for comprehensive analysis.
genePanels.advantages: Gene Panel Advantages: Targeted, cost-effective, short testing cycle. Suitable for genetic diseases with clear clinical suspicion, enabling rapid identification of relevant gene variants.

hero.title: GLSofort® Gene Sequencing Analysis Service
hero.subtitle: An assisted interpretation platform for WGS, WES, and Gene Panel data, combining machine learning, knowledge bases, and professional review for variant screening and reporting workflows.

intro.title: Our Company's Proprietary Software Platform GLSofort®
intro.description: GLSofort® assists with interpretation of next-generation sequencing (NGS) data across whole genome (WGS), whole exome (WES), and targeted Gene Panel workflows. It supports variant screening, evidence organization, and reporting; outputs require professional review with sample quality, clinical information, and applicable guidance.

panel.scope:
Cancer- and inherited-disease-related panels
Genes and scope depend on project configuration

wes.scope:
Cancer- and inherited-disease-related exonic regions
Interpretation depends on data quality and available evidence

wgs.scope:
Cancer- and inherited-disease-related whole-genome data
Interpretation depends on data quality and available evidence

ai.title: Virtual Geneticist System
ai.description: GLSofort® combines bioinformatics workflows, knowledge bases, and machine-learning methods to assist genomic data interpretation.

speed.title: Automated Analysis Workflow
speed.description: When data quality and project requirements are met, parts of the analysis can move from a weeks-scale to an hours-scale workflow; actual time depends on data volume and review requirements.

accuracy.title: Evidence-Assisted Interpretation
accuracy.description: Variant screening, evidence organization, and rule-based workflows support interpretation; qualified professionals make the final assessment.

compliance.title: Clinical Standards Compliance
compliance.description: Supports evidence organization using relevant ACMG guidance and can complement an institution's quality system; the implementing organization confirms regulatory suitability.

integration.title: Intelligent Integration Function
integration.description: Features can assist with research-evidence retrieval and structured organization; coverage and update frequency depend on configuration.

discovery.title: New Discovery Capability
discovery.description: Authorized data and knowledge bases can be updated to help professionals refine interpretations as evidence evolves.

advantages.title: Product Advantages
items: GLSofort® supports medical genetics workflows with bioinformatics systems, knowledge bases, and assisted analysis functions
Supports research-evidence retrieval and structured organization, with coverage and update frequency depending on configuration
When data quality and project requirements are met, parts of the analysis can move from a weeks-scale to an hours-scale workflow
Assists with evidence organization for reporting; efficiency and cost depend on project scale and review requirements
Can obtain new discoveries through accumulated clinical and genomic databases
Built-in Algorithm: AI Large Model Multi-dimensional Variant Scoring and Ranking Algorithm
AI Tool: GLS-AI Ten Million Loci Literature Database

hero.title: Sequencer Reagent Kits
hero.subtitle: High-throughput sequencing chips and reagent kits for NextSeq 500/550; specifications and batch performance are subject to product documentation and quality reports

overview.title: Product Overview
overview.description: High-throughput sequencing chips and reagent kits undergo batch quality testing. Displayed parameters and sample data are for product communication; actual performance depends on instrument, sample, and laboratory conditions.
overview.imageCaption: Brand laboratory-workflow illustration; it does not represent a specific product appearance or laboratory configuration.

reagents.title: Sequencing Reagents
reagents.description: Contains sequencing reaction reagents and buffer solutions with defined batch quality checks; stability and consistency are subject to the corresponding batch report.

chips.title: High-throughput Sequencing Chips
chips.description: The high-throughput sequencing chips have a stated output of 400M reads per run; actual output and quality depend on operating and sample conditions.

qualityControl.title: Quality Control Results
qualityControl.description: The following quality-control and parallel-comparison data are from three displayed batches. They represent those samples and operating conditions and are not a performance guarantee for every batch or use case:

table.passedStandard: Displayed batch met the stated value

quality.title: Batch Quality Control
quality.description: Each batch is checked against defined items, with a stated Q30 value of ≥91%. Refer to the batch quality report and actual run data for results.

performance.title: Stated Performance Parameters
performance.description: The stated output is 400M+ reads per run; actual output, quality, and cost depend on sample, instrument, and laboratory conditions.

compatibility.title: Platform Compatibility
compatibility.description: Designed for NextSeq 500/550 sequencers. Laboratories should confirm compatibility with their workflow before use.

cta.title: High-Quality Sequencing Reagents for Precise Genetic Testing
cta.subtitle: For more product information or purchasing inquiries, please contact our professional team

hero.title: Health Screening
hero.subtitle: Genetic risk association assessment and personalized health management information; results are not a diagnosis, prediction, or treatment recommendation

overview.title: Health Screening Services Overview
overview.description: Services cover selected genetic risks, carrier status, and pharmacogenomic information for children and adults. Results describe associations and require interpretation with family history, lifestyle, and clinical information.

healthManagement.title: Age-Appropriate Health Information
healthManagement.description: Genetic risk association and health management information for children and adults, within each project's stated scope.

geneticTesting.title: Genetic Information Analysis
geneticTesting.description: Assesses associations between selected genetic factors and health risks; it is not diagnosis or deterministic prediction.

medicationInstruction.title: Medication-Related Genetic Information
medicationInstruction.description: Provides pharmacogenomic information. A physician must decide prescriptions, doses, and medication changes.

adult.title: Adult Whole Exome Health Assessment Package
adult.description: Assesses selected inherited-disease risks, carrier status, and pharmacogenomic variants. Results present probabilities and evidence levels, do not provide a diagnosis or treatment decision, and require professional interpretation with clinical information.

child.title: Pediatric Whole Exome Health Assessment Package
child.description: Provides information about selected genetic risks and carrier status in children. Testing requires informed guardian involvement and does not replace pediatric assessment or routine care.

adult.title: Adult Whole Genome Health Assessment Package
adult.description: Analyzes selected variants across the whole genome for genetic risk, carrier status, and pharmacogenomic information. Interpretation depends on data quality, available evidence, and knowledge-base updates.

child.title: Pediatric Whole Genome Health Assessment Package
child.description: Analyzes selected variants across a child's whole genome. Results reflect current genetic evidence and cannot predict ability, achievement, or future health with certainty.

adult.title: Adult Gene Chip Screening Package
adult.description: Analyzes more than 700,000 sequence sites according to project configuration, with information that may cover risk associations, pharmacogenomics, diet, exercise, nutrition, and traits. Refer to the report for included sites and evidence levels.

child.title: Pediatric Gene Chip Screening Package
child.description: Gene chip screening designed specifically for children, covering multiple dimensions of genetic testing including growth and development, nutritional metabolism, and safe medication.

cancer.title: Male and Female Cancer Seven-Item Panel
cancer.description: Assesses selected inherited susceptibility factors for common cancers to support discussion of screening with a professional; it does not replace routine or clinical screening.

childMedicine.title: Pediatric Safe Medication (115 Items)
childMedicine.description: Uses sources such as CPIC guidance and PharmGKB to provide pediatric pharmacogenomic information. A physician must consider age, weight, condition, and other medicines when prescribing.

healthReport.title: Personal Health Check-up 78-Item Genetic Testing Report
healthReport.description: Analyzes selected genetic factors associated with common health concerns as a reference for health-management discussions. Lifestyle, diet, and screening decisions require appropriate professional advice.

childTraits.title: Pediatric Growth Traits Genetic Testing Product
childTraits.description: Presents selected genetic associations related to growth traits. These traits are influenced by genetics, environment, education, and other factors; results must not be used to judge a child's potential or ability.

comprehensive.title: Comprehensive Coverage
comprehensive.description: From children to adults, from disease risks to personality traits, providing full life-cycle genetic health management services.

precision.title: Evidence-Based Analysis
precision.description: Uses published research and databases for risk-association analysis; evidence level and applicability are described in the report.

safety.title: Safe Medication
safety.description: Provides pharmacogenomic information for physician review and must not be used to stop, switch, or change the dose of medication without medical advice.

lifelong.title: Updated Interpretation
lifelong.description: With authorization and available data, selected interpretations may be updated as research and databases evolve; scope and timing follow the service agreement.

families.title: Health-Conscious Families
items: Want to understand family genetic disease risks

individuals.title: Health-Conscious Individuals
items: Want to understand personal disease risks
Focus on nutrition and exercise guidance

steps.title: Consultation and Booking
steps.description: Professional genetic counselors provide detailed introduction to testing projects and help you choose suitable packages

steps.title: Sample Collection
steps.description: Saliva or another sample type is selected according to project requirements; guardian involvement is required for children

steps.title: Laboratory Testing
steps.description: Testing follows defined laboratory and quality-control processes, with quality metrics and limitations stated in the report

steps.title: Data Analysis
steps.description: Professional bioinformatics team conducts in-depth data mining and scientific interpretation

steps.title: Report Interpretation
steps.description: Provide detailed test reports and personalized health recommendations, with follow-up consultation services

cta.title: Explore a Genetic Risk Assessment That Fits Your Needs
cta.subtitle: Confirm the scope, sample requirements, and result limitations before deciding to test

hero.title: Data Compression System
hero.subtitle: ZipHelix massive data integrated solution system, solving sequencing data storage problems. GenomeLight introduces ZipHelix massive data integrated solution system, which can perform orderly archiving and lossless compression of raw data from the source. Multiple configurations meet the needs of different medical institutions and provide professional after-sales service to create a comprehensive gene data storage solution.

overview.title: ZipHelix Product Overview
overview.description: ZipHelix provides lossless compression, archiving, and storage-management functions for genomic sequencing data. Results depend on data, hardware, and deployment configuration.

compressionTechnique.title: ZipHelix compression technology
compressionTechnique.description: Supports lossless compression for FASTQ and related data; actual compression and space savings depend on data characteristics and test conditions

dataManagement.title: Intelligent data management
dataManagement.description: Supports automated archiving and backup alongside configured access-control and recovery policies

cloudDeployment.title: Cloud deployment
cloudDeployment.description: Supports local, private, and hybrid cloud deployment options

compression.title: Sequencing Data Compression
compression.description: ZipHelix provides lossless compression for FASTQ files; actual compression, space, and cost changes depend on data, hardware, and deployment conditions

automation.title: Automated Archiving
automation.description: ZipHelix embedded compression algorithm system can automatically perform batch data backup and archiving

storage.title: Object Storage Protection
storage.description: Data can be written to object storage with configured redundancy and recovery policies, reducing single-disk data-loss risk; recovery depends on deployment and backup state

flexible.title: Multiple Configurations
flexible.description: Multiple configurations to meet different scenario requirements

items.title: GLSofort® Cloud Data Analysis
items.description: Combined with cloud analysis platform, providing complete data processing and interpretation services

items.title: Secondary Analysis + Tertiary Interpretation + Data Compression System

items.title: Secondary Analysis + Data Compression System
items.description: Efficient solution focused on data analysis and compression storage

items.title: Tertiary Interpretation + Data Compression System
items.description: Professional solution combining data interpretation with compression storage

items.title: Support Multiple Data Types and Species
items.description: Can be configured for multiple sequencing formats and species; refer to product documentation for the supported list

items.title: Independent Operation Without Reference Database
items.description: Independent operation without external database dependencies

items.title: Customized Archiving Function
items.description: Customized data archiving strategies according to requirements

items.title: Lossless Compression
items.description: Maintains data consistency when compression and decompression verification succeeds

items.title: Reduced Transfer Volume
items.description: Smaller files can reduce network transfer volume; actual speed depends on the network and storage environment

items.title: Transparent Process
items.description: Clear and visible operation process and status monitoring

items.title: Accelerated Analysis Speed
items.description: Optimized data structure improves analysis efficiency

items.title: Preserved NGS Quality Information
items.description: Lossless compression and decompression do not change original quality scores when consistency checks pass

items.title: No Lock-in
items.description: Open data formats, avoiding vendor lock-in

items.title: Easy IT Deployment
items.description: Simplified deployment process, reducing IT maintenance costs

items.title: Cost Savings
items.description: Can reduce some storage usage; actual cost changes depend on data volume and deployment

compression.title: Compression Performance
items: Compression Rate: Depends on data and test conditions
Space and Cost Changes: Subject to deployment assessment
Supported Formats: FASTQ, BAM, SAM, etc.

companyIntro.title: Company Introduction
companyIntro.description1: Located in Chongqing Hi-tech Development Zone, we are a high-tech life health enterprise driven by precision medical services and AI big data technology, innovating future medical models.
companyIntro.description2: The company focuses on interpretation, annotation, and analysis of next-generation sequencing (NGS) data across whole genome (WGS), whole exome (WES), and targeted Gene Panel workflows. Products and services support healthcare organizations, research teams, and personal health contexts; qualified professionals must review outputs within the project's scope and relevant clinical information.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: Work closely with the medical community to provide careful data-analysis support for professional judgment.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: Use data-analysis technology to support inherited-disease healthcare and research needs.

product.title: Product Philosophy
product.content: Technology innovation and technical leadership in high-quality products and services are the foundation of our enterprise and the direct embodiment of technological innovation. GenomeLight will focus on solving industry pain points.

service.title: Service Philosophy
service.content: Integrity first, customer paramount. GenomeLight will provide the highest quality service with a professional, focused, and dedicated attitude.

values.title: Core Values
values.content: We continuously seek better solutions to meet the needs of patients and healthcare providers. We deeply understand patients and medical professionals, caring for and respecting their feelings. We adhere to the highest ethical and transparency standards, ensuring data security and confidentiality. We actively collaborate with the medical community, research institutions, and patient communities to jointly improve genetic disease management.

team.title: Team Introduction
team.description: Strong technical capabilities are the cornerstone supporting our high-quality products and services. Our core technology R&D team consists of senior scientists and engineers from home and abroad, including advanced talents in genetics, bioinformatics, and artificial intelligence. Our management team comprises experienced professionals who provide momentum for the company's development and operations.

liWenhui.name: Laura Li
liWenhui.title: FACMGG PhD, CTO
liWenhui.description: Trained under Nobel Prize winner in Physiology or Medicine and former President of Johns Hopkins University Daniel Nathans. Former Chief Scientist at Illumina, Founder of Breakthrough Genomics, Clinical Geneticist Molecular Biologist Scientist (CGMBS), PhD in Molecular Biology and Genetics from Johns Hopkins University, Postdoc at Caltech, Assistant Professor at USC, certified geneticist by the American College of Medical Genetics.

experience.title: Professional Experience
items: Director of Illumina Clinical Laboratory + Genetics Expert
Associate Director of Molecular Pathology and Genetics, Head of Clinical Genetics Laboratory at Children's Hospital Los Angeles

achievements.title: Major Achievements
items: Designed and developed NGS-based clinical disease detection methods
Designed and developed first-generation sequencing-based clinical genetic disease detection methods
Developed and validated first-generation sequencing-based clinical disease network electromagnetic field detection methods
Led genomic and biomarker research, establishing novel molecular diagnostic tests using genomics platforms

liuYunwei.name: Yunwei Liu
liuYunwei.title: CEO, Co-founder & Chairman of GenomeLight
liuYunwei.description: Founder & Chairman of Genomelight, mentored by internationally renowned radiation chemist Professor Chen Wenxiu. Former Bayer executive with strong industrialization capabilities and rich market resources.

background.title: Educational Background
items: Bachelor's and Master's degrees in Chemistry from Beijing Normal University
Mentored by internationally renowned radiation chemist Professor Chen Wenxiu
Bayer Executive EMBA at Swiss IMD Business School

experience.title: Professional Experience
items: Key positions at Chinese Academy of Sciences Radiation Chemistry, American ERM, Dutch DHV
CTO, Plant Manager, Asia-Pacific President at Bayer HQ, Bayer China, LANXESS, ArlanXeo, German CABB
Founded Chongqing Beiwei and Chongqing Deqiang Chemical
Strong industrialization capabilities and rich market resources

wangJia.name: Jia Wang
wangJia.title: CIO, Co-founder & CIO of GenomeLight
wangJia.description: Chairman of Shenzhen Qianhai GaDe Capital. Collaborated with Illumina and Intel Innovation Acceleration to support R&D and growth of technology startups in genetic testing field.

background.title: Educational Background
items: Clinical Medicine from Sun Yat-sen University
MBA from Tsinghua University Shenzhen Research Institute

expertise.title: Professional Expertise

Collaboration experience with Illumina and Intel Innovation Acceleration
Supporting technology startups in genetic testing field development
Expertise in combining product, business model, technology, sales, market, and financing perspectives for comprehensive enterprise development

dingHongyue.name: Hongyue Ding
dingHongyue.title: Master's from Chongqing Medical University
dingHongyue.description: Participated in the implementation of multiple national multi-center projects, hosted and completed advanced genetics training courses at multiple hospitals including Chongqing Children's Hospital and Sichuan West China Hospital. Long-term engagement in genetic disease diagnosis consultation, genetic counselor training, report interpretation and analysis.

experience.title: Work Experience
items: Participated in multiple national multi-center project implementations
Hosted genetics training courses at Chongqing Children's Hospital, Sichuan West China Hospital and other hospitals
Long-term engagement in genetic disease diagnosis consultation and genetic counselor training
Assisted in issuing and interpreting tens of thousands of clinical reports

achievements.title: Major Achievements
items: Multiple assistance in clinical physician research article publications
Rich experience in clinical genetic consultation and diagnostic assistance
Participated in and completed 1 National Natural Science Foundation general project
Participated in multiple provincial-level research projects

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.content: We treat genomic data and sensitive health information with care. Depending on the contract and deployment, projects may use access controls, encryption in transit, separation of identifiers, and data-retention policies. Applicable laws, industry requirements, data location, and user permissions must be confirmed before implementation.
